hero_title: The modern BBQ planner for your HomeLab.
hero_subtitle: Plan events, let guests place orders and work through everything as grill master – burgers, sausages, steaks, sides and drinks in one clean web app.
no_public_events: There is currently no public BBQ event.
login_failed: Login failed. User must be Griller and the password must match the container variable.
title: Title
no_items_selected: Please choose at least one product with quantity greater than 0.
order_saved: Order saved. The grill master can now see it on the todo list.
ready_hint: As soon as something is ready, it will automatically appear as done here.
empty_kitchen: No orders for this event yet.
upload_hint: The JSON may only contain simple key/value text entries. Missing strings automatically fall back to German/English.
admin_password_hint: Default user: Griller. Set the password through GRILLER_ADMIN_PASSWORD in .env.
public_hint: Set the status to Public so guests can see and join the event.
invalid_language: Language pack could not be saved. Please check JSON and language code.
footer: Made for relaxed BBQ events, clean HomeLab dashboards and hungry guests.
confirm_delete_event: Really delete this event? All guests and orders for this event will be removed.
cannot_delete_category_with_products: Category cannot be deleted while products are still assigned to it. Move or delete the products first.
cannot_delete_product_with_orders: Product cannot be deleted because it has already been used in orders. Please deactivate it instead.
delete_product_hint: Tip: Products that have already been ordered are not hard-deleted for traceability. In that case, simply remove the Active checkmark and save.
guests_hint: The event overview shows how many guests have already joined and ordered.
no_guests: No guests for this event yet.
guest_deleted: Guest deleted. Related orders were removed as well.
confirm_delete_guest: Really delete this guest? All orders from this guest will be removed as well.
guest_delete_hint: This shows every guest who joined the event. Deleting a guest also removes their orders.
